title: All Purpose Gloss Varnish 400ML - Professional Satin Finish Spray Wood Color Paint
description: Directions Prepare surface by sanding and cleaning. Apply in thin, even coats, allowing adequate drying time between coats. Use in a well-ventilated area and follow safety guidelines for aerosol products.
